title: IKEA Markus office chair
description: Black mesh ergonomic office chair, used about 2 years, no rips or stains, fully adjustable. Pickup only.

title: iPhone 14 Pro 256GB
description: Space black, unlocked, battery health 91 percent, comes with original box and cable. Small scratch on the back.

title: Yamaha FG800 acoustic guitar
description: Solid spruce top, includes soft case and capo. Light pick wear on the soundhole, plays beautifully.

title: Vintage tan leather sofa
description: Three-seater, real leather, mid-century style. Some patina on the arms, structurally solid.

title: Trek Marlin 5 mountain bike
description: Medium frame, 29 inch wheels, new tires last spring. Hydraulic disc brakes recently serviced.
